title: mentha gentilis subsp. cardiaca
intro: Mentha gentilis subsp. cardiaca, also known as wild mint or pennyroyal, is a subspecies of mint native to Europe and Asia. This herb has been used for centuries in traditional medicine due to its medicinal properties, including its antispasmodic, anti-inflammatory, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Mentha gentilis subsp. cardiaca include relieving digestive issues, reducing menstrual cramps and bloating, and even aiding in weight loss. Herbal preparations of this plant include teas, infusions, and essential oils, which can be used topically or internally to harness its medicinal properties.
